subcodes.first_line: We have hearkened unto thy call and recognized thy turning unto the Countenance. We make mention of thee in this Tablet which hath shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندائک و عرفنا توجهک الی الوجه ذکرناک بهذا اللوح الذی لاح من افق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
